title: Pivot stack: Deepgram Nova-2 + Claude + Rails/Sidekiq + ffmpeg, atomic skills
description: User pivot. Scrap existing Python pipeline approach; modularize every step of shorts production into individual Claude Code skills. Stack: Deepgram Nova-2 (transcription), Claude (LLM reasoning/orchestration), Rails+Sidekiq (optional thin wrapper, skills-first), ffmpeg (media ops). End-to-end goal: upload video -> identify speaker -> reframe to speaker -> burn subtitles -> cut N shorts -> upload each to its own auto-created Drive folder per source video. Audit phase first to decide what existing code (pipeline_v2, subtitler, ranker, grader) is salvageable.

title: Add hello.md with the word "hi"
description:
Dispatched from GitHub issue jperrello/shorts#1. Body:\n\nCreate a new file at the repo root named `hello.md`. Its contents should be the single word: hi

That's all — no other content, no other files. A trailing newline is fine.
